---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem / motivation**
What real problem does this solve? Who hits it?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why they're worse.

**Architectural impact**
Does this touch an invariant (isolation, zero-LLM-runtime thesis, a red line)? If so, it likely needs an ADR — see [docs/adr/README.md](../../docs/adr/README.md).
